product_basic_kyc.product_name: Modern Geometric Diamond Stud Earrings for Women - Fashiony Elegant Earwear
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian women aged 20-40, fashion-conscious, working professionals and festive shoppers
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Daily wear and office wear to add a subtle yet elegant sparkle
secondary_use_cases: Gift for special occasions like anniversaries and birthdays
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for Indian festivals like Diwali and weddings, as well as professional settings and casual outings

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Aligns with Indian preference for diamond and gold-tone jewellery that blends modern design with traditional auspiciousness
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Worn daily at work, paired with sarees or western office wear; also worn during festivals and family events
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Chic modern Indian woman balancing tradition and contemporary style with minimalist jewellery
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Provides the prestige and emotional sentiment of fine jewellery while being practical for everyday Indian lifestyle and gifting

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Modern Geometric Diamond Stud Earrings for Women by Fashiony | Elegant Gold & Diamond Design Earwear
bullet_points: Elegant Geometric Design: Adds a modern yet timeless look perfect for both traditional and western outfits.
High-Quality Craftsmanship: Made with fine gold-plated finish and diamond-like stones that shine brilliantly.
Comfortable for All-Day Wear: Lightweight studs ensure comfort from office hours to evening functions.
Versatile Wear: Ideal for daily use, festivals, weddings, and gifting to loved ones.
Secure Backings: Reliable clasp that ensures your earrings stay safely in place throughout the day.
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Experience the perfect blend of modern design and traditional elegance with Fashiony's Modern Geometric Diamond Stud Earrings. Crafted for style-conscious Indian women, these earrings are ideal for daily wear, festive occasions, and gifting.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Close-up visuals of the diamond studs highlighting sparkle and craftsmanship
Lifestyle images showing pairing with Indian sarees and western office wear
Infographic on material quality, comfort, and secure backing features
Heritage-inspired design story blending modern geometry with Indian elegance
Gift packaging and unboxing experience visuals

gold plated diamond stud earrings for office wear
gift earrings for women in India

visual_improvements: Incorporate warm, elegant home or office backgrounds
Show earrings with both traditional and western Indian outfits
Highlight sparkle and premium finish using soft, natural lighting
Provide multiple angles including ear closeup and side profile
messaging_improvements: Focus on modern geometric design appeal
Emphasize comfort and daily wear suitability
Highlight brand quality trust and gifting suitability
Use Indian cultural references in messaging without over-traditionalization
lifestyle_positioning: Position as earrings for modern, confident Indian women balancing tradition and style
Showcase versatility for festivals, work, and casual outings
Include gifting scenario visuals and messaging
trust_premium_perception: Use rich gold and diamond closeups emphasizing craftsmanship
Show premium packaging and authentic brand badge
Include subtle luxury lifestyle elements like silk sarees or elegant office settings

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Earring shape, gold color, diamond accents, and overall geometric design must remain exactly as per the original product image without alteration.
recommended_image_angles: Macro shot focusing on setting detail
Model profile showing natural ear placement
Backside clasp and locking mechanism detail
recommended_real_life_environments: Indoor office environment with soft natural light
Festive Indian home setup with warm tones
Ethnic wedding or traditional event backdrop
indian_lifestyle_settings: Woman wearing saree at Diwali celebration
Professional woman at office desk wearing studs
Casual meet-up with friends in urban cafe
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Professional soft diffused lighting to highlight sparkle and gold finish with realistic skin tone rendering for Indian complexions.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimalistic backgrounds with subtle luxury elements, warm tones, and focus on product clarity and lifestyle relatability.

suitable_backgrounds: Soft beige or cream solid backgrounds
Luxury fabric textures like silk or velvet
Warm wooden furniture or ethnic wooden décor
Muted festival decorations with warm lights
lifestyle_scenarios: Woman dressed in kurti working on a laptop wearing earrings
Closeup of ear with earrings and traditional bindi
Elegant gifting box with ribbon and earrings placed inside
Evening festival lighting with woman smiling in background
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top left or bottom right corners on lifestyle images to avoid obstruction of the earrings, ideally with transparent or soft font backgrounds.
what_must_be_avoided: Dark or harsh lighting that obscures earring detail
Unnatural skin tones or heavy makeup
Changing product color or design details
